selection_reasons.choose-falsify-9x1-full-bank: current panel winner retained unchanged; provisional leader across 3 fresh panels: 19/42 exact
selection_reasons.repair-falsify-5x3-efficient: established pooled champion across 24 fresh panels: 133/312 exact; 38.5% weakest family

source: mechanical anchors plus iteration 27 Sol director

strategies.hypothesis: A single independent answer is the minimum-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Direct One

strategies.hypothesis: A small independent plurality is a stable low-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Five-Vote Plurality

strategies.hypothesis: Favor the exact cheaper selector after two matched panels produced identical exact accuracy to three selectors. This tests candidate-only selection with two fewer calls per case while pooling replication under the existing mechanism.
strategies.name: Nine-Bank One-Selector Falsifying Selection

strategies.hypothesis: Retain the pooled champion unchanged as the principal replicated answer-generating repair control.
strategies.name: Efficient Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Continue the reviewer-depth ablation: one repairer outperformed three on Iteration 27, generated more missing answers, and costs two fewer calls per case.
strategies.name: One-Review Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Retain the frozen orthogonal candidate-generation pipeline unchanged to determine whether its pooled oracle-coverage gain and positive intervention balance survive another fresh panel.
strategies.name: Blind Regeneration then Falsifying Integration
